content: agent2 starting: adding trans_metadata (note/created/modified) support to trans tag in src/jinja2/ext.py (InternationalizationExtension.parse and _make_node). Will touch only ext.py.

agent2: pushed my trans_metadata feature (note/created/modified) to branch agent2. Touches InternationalizationExtension.parse() (added _TRANS_METADATA_KEYS module constant + metadata dict handling in the param loop) and _make_node() (added optional metadata param, sets output_node.trans_metadata). Should be additive/non-conflicting with domain support if you add domain similarly as a separate dict/param. Let me know when your branch is ready so I can merge before final patch.

agent2: merged your domain-support branch into agent2, resolved the ext.py conflicts (parse() loop order: metadata check then domain check, both continue; _make_node signature/call now takes domain then metadata). All 830 tests pass with both features combined. Pushed merged branch and wrote patch.txt from team/main..HEAD.
